-        <CommandText>-- VISUAL ENTERPRISE &gt; WORK_ORDER REPORTS &gt; Work Orders by Part with Cost
-SELECT PART_ID
-	, BASE_ID
-	, DESIRED_WANT_DATE
-	, [STATUS]
-	, CLOSE_DATE

+        <CommandText>/*	
+	SQL_Bi-1.DataWarehouse 
+	VISUAL ENTERPRISE &gt; WORK_ORDER REPORTS &gt; Work Orders by Part with Cost
+	for SQL-Lab-2.dbo.LIVEARC 
+*/
+SELECT PART_ID, BASE_ID, DESIRED_WANT_DATE, [STATUS], CLOSE_DATE, DESIRED_QTY, 
+	[ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST] AS TotalActualCost,
+	([ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST])/DESIRED_QTY AS AvgActualCost, 
+	CREATE_DATE, 'LIVEARC' as 'Data_Base'
+FROM [SQL-Lab-2].[LIVEARC].[dbo].[WORK_ORDER]
+WHERE (PART_ID  LIKE @Part_Number) AND 	[TYPE] = 'W' AND DESIRED_QTY &gt; 0 AND [STATUS] != 'X'
+	AND BASE_ID not in (

+	)
+
+	UNION
+
+-- VISUAL ENTERPRISE &gt; WORK_ORDER REPORTS &gt; Work Orders by Part with Cost
+SELECT PART_ID, BASE_ID, DESIRED_WANT_DATE, [STATUS], CLOSE_DATE, DESIRED_QTY
 	, [ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST] AS TotalActualCost
-	, ([ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST])/DESIRED_QTY AS AvgActualCost
+	, ([ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST])/DESIRED_QTY AS AvgActualCost,
+	CREATE_DATE, 'LIVE' as 'Data_Base'
 FROM WORK_ORDER
-WHERE (PART_ID  LIKE @Part_Number)
-	AND [TYPE] = 'W'
-	AND DESIRED_QTY &gt; 0</CommandText>
+WHERE (PART_ID  LIKE @Part_Number) AND 
+	[TYPE] = 'W' AND DESIRED_QTY &gt; 0  AND [STATUS] != 'X' --AND CREATE_DATE &gt;= '2024-12-21'</CommandText>
         <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner>
       </Query>
